title: Nomadland
logline: After losing her home and husband in a company town closure, a woman in her sixties embarks on a journey through the American West in a van, discovering a community of modern nomads while searching for a place to belong.
antagonistOrConflict: Economic displacement and the search for belonging in modern America
themes: Home as a concept vs. place

actBreaks.description: Fern arrives at RTR and enters the nomad community, marking her full transition from displaced person to active nomad.

validation.ruling: Scene #35 cannot be both inciting incident and act break. Scene #61 shows Swankie revealing her terminal cancer diagnosis and decision to live fully until she dies, fundamentally shifting the story from survival mode to confronting mortality and what makes life meaningful.

actBreaks.description: Fern arrives at Dave's house and confronts the possibility of settling down again, representing the story's major choice point.

validation.ruling: Scene #137 shows Fern arriving at Dave's beautiful homestead and meeting his family, representing the major shift into the final act where she must choose between nomadic life and conventional domesticity - this irreversibly changes the story's direction toward her ultimate decision.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: This script employs a circular, episodic structure that mirrors the nomadic lifestyle it depicts. Rather than following traditional dramatic escalation, it moves in seasonal cycles - Amazon work in winter, summer jobs, RTR gatherings - creating a rhythm that reflects the protagonist's new reality. The story begins and ends in Empire, Nevada, but Fern's return is transformed by her journey. Each episode deepens our understanding of nomad culture while tracking Fern's gradual acceptance of her new identity. The structure resists conventional plot mechanics in favor of observational storytelling that accumulates emotional weight through repetition and variation.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The pacing follows natural rhythms rather than manufactured tension. Long stretches of work scenes (Amazon warehouse, Wall Drug, sugar beet factory) are punctuated by moments of human connection and landscape contemplation. The script slows down for intimate conversations (scenes 58, 80, 133-134) and accelerates through montages of travel and work. The final act's pacing mirrors the opening, creating a meditative bookend structure.

incitingIncident.description: Fern arrives at RTR, a cluster of 50 vehicles in the desert, finds Linda May among nomads listening to Bob Wells speak about rejecting the tyranny of the dollar.

validation.ruling: Scene #1 shows Fern packing storage items but doesn't shatter her ordinary world - that already happened off-screen. Scene #35 is the true inciting incident where Fern arrives at RTR and hears Bob Wells' speech about society throwing people away and nomads taking care of each other, establishing her new community and the main journey of finding belonging among the nomads.

midpoint.description: Fern smokes outside Rapid City Hospital, watching people come and go.

validation.ruling: Scene #89 shows Fern passively smoking outside the hospital, which is reactive behavior. Scene #88 is the true midpoint where Fern proactively takes care of Dave when he's seriously ill, bringing him soup and urging him to seek medical attention - this shifts her from reactive wanderer to someone who actively cares for her nomad community.

climax.description: Fern runs from the house to Vanguard, climbs inside, lies under the covers, and touches the familiar low ceiling before closing her eyes.

validation.ruling: Scene #146 shows Fern's defining choice as she walks out of Dave's house and runs to Vanguard, choosing the nomadic life over conventional comfort - this is her ultimate confrontation with the choice between settling down versus continuing her journey, resolving the main story question of where she belongs.

scenes.heading: EXT. EMPIRE - STORAGE - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern searches through boxes in a storage unit, selecting items to load into her van, and holds her deceased husband's work coat to her face while fighting back tears.
scenes.turningPointNote: Establishes Fern's transition to nomadic life and reveals her recent loss

scenes.heading: EXT. ROAD - NORTHERN NEVADA - EVENING
scenes.summary: Vanguard travels across a frostbitten Nevada landscape.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROAD SIDE - LATER
scenes.summary: Fern squats shivering by the roadside to urinate while watching for cars.

scenes.heading: INT. ROAD - NORTHERN NEVADA - DUSK
scenes.summary: Fern drives through the dark highway while gently singing a Christmas carol.

scenes.heading: EXT. DESERT ROSE RV PARK - OFFICE - SAME NIGHT
scenes.summary: Vanguard pulls up to the Desert Rose RV Park office covered in snow and icicles.

scenes.heading: INT. DESERT ROSE RV PARK - OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern nervously waits as manager Patty searches for her reservation, initially not finding it before locating her on the Amazon CamperForce list.

scenes.heading: EXT. DESERT ROSE RV PARK - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Vanguard parks in a spot and the engine rattles to a stop.

scenes.heading: INT. VANGUARD - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern closes the curtain in her van, cooks mac and cheese, eats alone, does dishes, uses a bucket toilet, and goes to bed with a red Santa light glowing.

scenes.heading: EXT. AMAZON WAREHOUSE - NEXT MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern approaches the giant Amazon warehouse in the morning chill.

scenes.heading: INT. AMAZON WAREHOUSE - SECURITY LINE - MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern lines up with seasonal workers at Amazon security and nods to Al, a man she knows, who comments that there seem to be more workers every year.

scenes.heading: INT. AMAZON WAREHOUSE - DAY
scenes.summary: Fern works in the massive, bone-rattling Amazon warehouse pushing a cart and packing boxes alongside Linda May, a warm ambassador who helps workers.

scenes.heading: EXT. AMAZON WAREHOUSE - BACK - DAY
scenes.summary: Fern and Linda May smoke behind the warehouse where Linda reveals she quit smoking after 43 years due to macular degeneration, causing Fern to quickly put out her cigarette.

scenes.heading: EXT. DESERT ROSE RV PARK - LATER
scenes.summary: Fern walks down a muddy path carrying oversized laundry.

scenes.heading: INT. DESERT ROSE RV PARK - LAUNDRY - SAME EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern and Linda May share detergent and competitively work on a jigsaw puzzle while waiting for laundry.

scenes.heading: I/E. DESERT ROSE RV PARK - VANGUARD - SAME EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern shows Linda May the interior of Vanguard, demonstrating her storage solutions and revealing her husband's old fishing box converted to a spice rack.

scenes.heading: INT. AMAZON WAREHOUSE - DAYS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern works at Amazon with almost comical seriousness.

scenes.heading: EXT. FERNLEY - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern drives through falling snow in the evening.

scenes.heading: INT. SPORTS STORE - LATER
scenes.summary: Fern falls asleep on a weightlifting bench in a sports store and is awakened by Brandy, a former acquaintance with daughters who recognize her as Mrs. M, leading to an awkward conversation about her van life.

scenes.heading: EXT. DESERT ROSE RV PARK - SQUEEZE INN - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Linda May's small fiberglass trailer called the Squeeze Inn sits decorated with Christmas lights and glowing pink flamingos.

scenes.heading: INT. SQUEEZE INN - SAME
scenes.summary: Fern knits while listening to Linda May recount how financial desperation in 2008 led her to contemplate suicide before her dogs' trust stopped her and she chose van life instead.

scenes.heading: INT. AMAZON WAREHOUSE - WEEKS LATER
scenes.summary: Workers move at double-speed during holiday shopping season as the massive warehouse makes them appear smaller.

scenes.heading: EXT. AMAZON WAREHOUSE - NIGHT A WEEK LATER
scenes.summary: Fern smokes alone outside Amazon as coworker Doug says goodbye for the season.

scenes.heading: INT. DESERT ROSE RV PARK - VANGUARD - NEW YEAR EVE
scenes.summary: Fern celebrates New Year's Eve alone in her van with bread, hot milk, sugar, and a Happy New Year headband while fireworks sound in the distance.

scenes.heading: EXT. DESERT ROSE RV PARK - VANGUARD - MORNING A WEEK LATER
scenes.summary: Fern cleans snow off Vanguard when she sees a dog sniffing near her belongings.

scenes.heading: INT. OFFICE - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Patty tells Fern that Carl had a stroke and his daughter took him east but left his dog Scout, offering the dog to Fern who declines, then discusses checkout and increased rates now that Amazon season is over.

scenes.heading: INT. FALLON - JOB CENTER - DAY
scenes.summary: Fern sits across from a job center recruiter, listing her qualifications including college education and various work experience, but the recruiter notes Empire mine shut down before she can finish.

scenes.heading: EXT. FOX PEAK GAS STATION - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Vanguard pulls into a gas station during a nighttime blizzard.

scenes.heading: EXT. FOX PEAK GAS STATION - VANGUARD - LATER
scenes.summary: Gas station manager Rachel approaches Fern and warns about the dropping temperature, suggesting a church shelter, but Fern insists she'll be fine with her sleeping bag.

scenes.heading: INT. FOX PEAK GAS STATION - VANGUARD - SAME NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern wraps herself in layers of blankets and sleeping bags but shivers hard, unable to get warm.

scenes.heading: EXT. FOX PEAK GAS STATION - NEXT MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern smokes by Vanguard on frozen ground as lights turn on in suburban homes and a freight train passes, signaling it's time to move on.

scenes.heading: INT. VANGUARD ON HIGHWAY - DAWN
scenes.summary: Fern drives through darkness as dawn illuminates a new landscape ahead.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROAD IN DESERT - MORNING
scenes.summary: Vanguard heads south through warm desert landscape, passing sleepy towns, billboards, and hitchhikers.

scenes.heading: EXT. QUARTZSITE, ARIZONA - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern drives through the bustling desert town of Quartzsite filled with diverse groups of people and vehicles, where traffic crawls and no one hurries.

scenes.heading: I/E. VANGUARD ON UNPAVED ROAD IN THE DESERT - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern follows a hand-drawn map on bumpy desert roads until she spots yellow RTR signs and turns deeper into the desert.

scenes.heading: EXT. RTR - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern arrives at RTR, a cluster of 50 vehicles in the desert, finds Linda May among nomads listening to Bob Wells speak about rejecting the tyranny of the dollar.
scenes.turningPointNote: Fern enters the nomad community that will become central to her journey

scenes.heading: EXT. RTR - DUSK
scenes.summary: Fern and Linda May wait in line for chili, where Fern declines vegan stew from Dave and meets Swankie, another carnivore with her arm in a sling.

scenes.heading: EXT. RTR - CAMPFIRE - LATER THAT NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nomads gather around a campfire sharing stories of what led them to life on the road, including Bryce discussing his PTSD and Deni recounting family members' cancer diagnoses.

scenes.heading: EXT. RTR - CAMP - DAWN
scenes.summary: Bob Wells sits with Fern at dawn, acknowledging her losses of husband and town while suggesting that connecting to nature and community might help her heal.

scenes.heading: EXT. RTR - CAMP - LATER
scenes.summary: Fern walks through the camp observing morning routines and community activities like solar panel installation, haircuts, and Tai-Chi, declining Linda May's invitation to join a group.

scenes.heading: EXT. RTR - MAIN CAMP - MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern takes notes during Bob Wells' stealth parking seminar and participates in Forest's tire repair class where women laugh at accidental innuendos, making Fern blush.

scenes.heading: EXT. RTR - CAMP - FREE PILE - NEXT MORNING
scenes.summary: At the free pile, Dave advises Fern on can opener selection and observes that items disappear in vans, while Fern trades a handmade pot holder for his recommendation.

scenes.heading: EXT. QUARTZSITE - RV SHOW - NEXT DAY
scenes.summary: Fern, Linda May, and Swankie enjoy corn dogs and sign up for seasonal jobs at the massive Quartzsite RV show.

scenes.heading: EXT. RV SHOW - LATER
scenes.summary: The three women walk past a lot of huge, expensive RVs, comparing them to dinosaurs and marveling at the money represented.

scenes.heading: INT. GIANT RV - SAME
scenes.summary: Fern, Linda May, and Swankie explore a luxurious RV with leather sofas, marble counters, and a washer-dryer, looking in wonder at the amenities.

scenes.heading: EXT. RTR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern signs a cardboard van that's burned in a bonfire while nomads gather to sing their version of 'On the Road Again' called 'Burn the Van Again.'

scenes.heading: INT. QUARTZSITE YACHT CLUB - SAME NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern line dances with Linda May and Swankie at the Quartzsite Yacht Club, gets drunk, and later accepts Dave's invitation to dance to an old cowboy song.

scenes.heading: EXT. RTR - NEXT MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern sadly watches as a line of vans and RVs pull out of RTR like a wagon train, waving goodbye as the gathering ends.

scenes.heading: EXT. DESERT - VANGUARD - MORNING A MONTH LATER
scenes.summary: A month later in the empty, hot desert, Fern finishes installing a new panel on Vanguard and spots Swankie hoisting a pirate flag by her van in the distance.

scenes.heading: INT. LAUNDROMAT AND MALL - DAY
scenes.summary: Fern reads while waiting for laundry and tears off a contact number from a job bulletin board.

scenes.heading: EXT. QUARTZSITE - TROCK - DAYS LATER
scenes.summary: At her new job sorting rocks and gems, Fern introduces young travelers Noodle and Roxy to her boss Ron, advocating for their handmade jewelry as superior to current inventory.

scenes.heading: EXT. DESERT - NEXT MORNING
scenes.summary: Thunder approaches as Fern discovers Vanguard has a flat tire and kicks it in frustration.

scenes.heading: EXT. SWANKIE’S VAN - LATER
scenes.summary: Fern knocks on Swankie's van despite the 'do not disturb' flag, asking for a ride to town because she has no spare tire.

scenes.heading: EXT. QUARTZSITE - GARAGE - DAY
scenes.summary: At the garage, Swankie lectures Fern about taking the nomad lifestyle seriously while Vanguard is being repaired, then asks Fern to help her prepare for an important trip.

scenes.heading: EXT. SWANKIE'S VAN - DAY
scenes.summary: Swankie teaches Fern to touch up paint on her van, calling it 'ratty,' then shows Fern her home videos while Fern works on digitizing them.

scenes.heading: EXT. VANGUARD - NEXT MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern brushes her teeth and inspects Vanguard, realizing it's more rusty than she thought and groaning about Swankie calling it ratty.

scenes.heading: INT. VANGUARD - LATER
scenes.summary: Fern practices flute badly, then uses her bucket toilet when Swankie knocks on the door at an awkward moment.

scenes.heading: EXT. SWANKIE’S VAN - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Swankie lays out all her possessions for sale, giving Fern a green lawn chair and showing off her rock collection while explaining she's giving everything away.

scenes.heading: INT. SWANKIE’S VAN - LATER
scenes.summary: While digitizing Swankie's videos, Fern watches her sleep and cough violently before Swankie reveals she has cancer that has returned to her lung.
scenes.turningPointNote: Swankie's cancer revelation fundamentally changes the context of her departure and deepens Fern's understanding of mortality and loss.

scenes.heading: EXT. SWANKIE’S VAN - NEXT DAY
scenes.summary: People come to buy Swankie's belongings, with Swankie explaining items and watching a woman drive away with her grandmother's music box.

scenes.heading: I/E. VANGUARD - SAME NIGHT
scenes.summary: Unable to sleep, Fern watches Swankie prepare her kayak outside, then looks through her own photos including images of her parents, sister, and late husband Beau.

scenes.heading: EXT. SWANKIE’S VAN - NEXT MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern shaves Swankie's head and confesses she considered prolonging her husband Beau's morphine to help him die sooner, with Swankie suggesting maybe he was trying to stay longer for Fern.

scenes.heading: INT. OASIS BOOK STORE - NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Paul Winer, the naked bookseller, performs a boogie woogie song about toasting friends who had to go away while Fern sits in the audience.

scenes.heading: EXT. DESERT SUBURB - SECURITY GATE - DAY
scenes.summary: Vanguard arrives at a security gate of a sprawling desert suburb development with no one around.

scenes.heading: EXT. DESERT SUBURB - DAY
scenes.summary: Fern walks through identical houses carrying Swankie's box and rings a doorbell.

scenes.heading: EXT. DOUG’S HOUSE - SAME
scenes.summary: Doug, Swankie's son, coldly receives the box of digitized home videos from Fern and tells her to leave it by the hose rather than accepting it personally.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROADS IN VARIOUS LOCATIONS - TIME PASSING
scenes.summary: Fern travels through various landscapes, visiting an abandoned western town, swimming naked in Cascade Falls, and arriving at Badlands National Park campground.

scenes.heading: INT. CEDER PASS CAMPGROUND - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern cuts her hair at the campground sink while moths hover around the fluorescent bulb.

scenes.heading: EXT. VANGUARD - NEXT MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern prepares for her camp host job by ironing her uniform, doing stretches, eating oatmeal, and making coffee.

scenes.heading: EXT. CEDER PASS CAMPGROUND - MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern offers coffee to campers and encounters Dave, who recognizes her and is also working at the campground as a National Park volunteer.

scenes.heading: EXT. CEDER PASS CAMPGROUND - DAY
scenes.summary: Linda May shows Fern the camp hosting duties while Fern follows with a yellow mopping station.

scenes.heading: INT. CAMPGROUND BATHROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Fern and Linda May clean dirty campground bathrooms, with Fern dedicating herself to the worst toilet cleaning tasks.

scenes.heading: EXT. CEDER PASS CAMPGROUND - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern and Linda May drive a golf cart around the campground, playfully chasing each other with abandoned underwear until Victor approaches about a power outage.

scenes.heading: EXT. BADLANDS NP - VISITOR CENTER - MORNING FEW DAYS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern and Linda May walk toward the visitor center.

scenes.heading: INT. VISITOR CENTER - DAY
scenes.summary: At the visitor center, Fern examines a taxidermy rattlesnake while Linda fixes her hair, and Fern notices Dave helping young female travelers at the counter.

scenes.heading: EXT. BADLANDS NP - DOOR TRAIL - EVENING
scenes.summary: Dave guides a geological tour of the Badlands while Fern wanders away from the group to explore rock formations and collect sandy rocks.

scenes.heading: EXT. HORSESHOE BAR - WEEKS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern, Linda May, Dave, and Greg take tequila shots together at a cowboy bar while Linda shows off photos of her land on her cracked phone screen.

scenes.heading: EXT. CEDER PASS CAMPGROUND - EVENING
scenes.summary: Linda May prepares to leave with her trailer hooked up, embracing Fern for a long goodbye and inviting her to visit anytime before driving away.

scenes.heading: INT. VANGUARD - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern tosses and turns in bed, unable to sleep, and discovers she's out of tobacco.

scenes.heading: EXT. DAVE’S VAN - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern asks Dave for a cigarette but he doesn't smoke, leading to an awkward conversation before Fern announces she's driving to Wall despite Dave's warning about driving through the park at night.

scenes.heading: INT. FERN’S VAN IN BADLANDS - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern drives through the menacing nighttime badlands, humming to herself.

scenes.heading: EXT. WALL - GAS STATION - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern rolls and smokes a cigarette at a gas station while watching the distant lights of Rapid City.

scenes.heading: EXT. VANGUARD - NEXT DAY
scenes.summary: Fern discovers ants in her van and pulls everything out to clean while Dave offers her licorice sticks as a cigarette substitute, which she reluctantly accepts despite saying she won't quit smoking.

scenes.heading: INT. VANGUARD - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern glues broken pieces back together and manages to save one item, feeling relieved.

scenes.heading: EXT. CAMPGROUND BATHROOM - DAYS LATER
scenes.summary: Without her friends, Fern works alone mopping floors and cleaning vomit from toilet seats, the work becoming more lonesome.

scenes.heading: EXT. CEDAR PASS CAMPGROUND - LATER
scenes.summary: Fern smokes while driving the golf cart and listens to Grandma, an elderly camper, give advice about being a nomad and asks about Fern's wedding ring.

scenes.heading: EXT. BADLANDS - CAMPGROUND - MORNING WEEKS LATER
scenes.summary: A storm hits the badlands as summer comes to an end.

scenes.heading: EXT. VANGUARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Fern boils canned soup on her camping stove.

scenes.heading: INT. DAVE'S VAN - LATER
scenes.summary: Fern brings soup to Dave who is bedridden with a high fever, and she urges him to seek medical attention when he can't eat and his fever persists over 100 degrees.

scenes.heading: EXT. RAPID CITY HOSPITAL - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern smokes outside Rapid City Hospital, watching people come and go.

scenes.heading: INT. RAPID CITY HOSPITAL - HALLWAY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern sits alone in the empty hospital hallway.

scenes.heading: INT. RAPID CITY HOSPITAL - FRONT DESK - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nurse Matt explains that Dave had laparoscopic surgery for diverticulitis and can return to work in a week, but Fern declines to see him and leaves.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROAD ON PLAINS - SAME NIGHT
scenes.summary: Exhausted, Fern drives through the night until she pulls over at a gas station to sleep.

scenes.heading: I/E. VANGUARD OUTSIDE GAS STATION - NEXT MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern eats a breakfast sandwich and tries one of Dave's licorice sticks, hating the taste.

scenes.heading: INT. GROCERY STORE ON PLAINS - SAME DAY
scenes.summary: Fern carefully checks prices and expiration dates while grocery shopping.

scenes.heading: INT. RAPID CITY HOSPITAL - ROOM - SAME DAY
scenes.summary: Fern brings food items including cup of noodles, juice box, animal crackers, jello, and Dave's favorite canned mackerel to his hospital room where he's recovering well.

scenes.heading: INT. WALL DRUG - TWO WEEKS LATER
scenes.summary: Two weeks later, Fern works at Wall Drug in uniform boxing donuts alongside international workers while Dave works there too carrying trays and making roast beef sandwiches.

scenes.heading: EXT. REPTILE GARDEN - DAYS LATER
scenes.summary: Dave takes Fern to Reptile Garden where she pets Tank, a 100-year-old tortoise, and has a python wrapped around her neck while kids gather around.

scenes.heading: EXT. WALL - DISPERSED CAMPING - EVENING
scenes.summary: Dave and Fern share a quiet dinner of sausages, corn, and salad on a cliff with a breathtaking view, finding silent comfort together.

scenes.heading: EXT. WALL DRUG - DUSK
scenes.summary: Fern and Dave walk to the 80-foot Wall Drug dinosaur where Dave takes a picture of Fern smiling.

scenes.heading: EXT. CEDAR PASS CAMPGROUND - SAME NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern and Dave join Brad and other campers for a nighttime astronomy demonstration, learning about planet Vega and looking at Jupiter through a telescope.

scenes.heading: INT. WALL DRUG RESTAURANT - EVENING A WEEK LATER
scenes.summary: James, Dave's son, arrives at the restaurant looking for his father while Fern is cleaning up after closing.

scenes.heading: INT. WALL DRUG - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern tries to eavesdrop on Dave and James's conversation in the kitchen, then talks with James about AA meetings and travel while he eats.

scenes.heading: INT. KITCHEN - LATER THAT NIGHT
scenes.summary: Dave shows Fern a photo of his pregnant daughter-in-law and reveals that James wants him to return home for the birth of his grandchild.
scenes.turningPointNote: Dave faces a major life decision between his nomadic lifestyle and family obligations

scenes.heading: I/E. VANGUARD - NEXT MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern ignores Dave's knock on her van door and finds he has left her a smooth beach rock with holes and a note before driving away.

scenes.heading: INT. WALL DRUG - EVENING DAYS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern cleans the grill, plays on a jackalope statue, shoots arcade games, and takes a selfie with a Mount Rushmore model in the empty restaurant.

scenes.heading: EXT. VANGUARD - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern eats canned sardines on toast and watches cowboys drinking and singing by a pickup truck in the distance.

scenes.heading: EXT. WALL DRUG - NIGHTS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern walks alone down the empty street at night as tourist season ends and most stores have closed.

scenes.heading: EXT. WESTERN SUGAR - NEBRASKA - WEEKS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern works at Western Sugar in Nebraska, wearing safety gear while shoveling beets and signaling trucks on the deafening conveyor belt.

scenes.heading: EXT. DOWNTOWN SCOTTSBLUFF - NEXT MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern does laundry and eats at a Mexican restaurant where she observes a family celebrating a father's birthday.

scenes.heading: EXT. WESTERN SUGAR - DAYS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern continues the harsh beet work despite exhaustion, then sits in her van eating cup noodles while looking at other migrant workers' vehicles.

scenes.heading: EXT. SCOTTSBLUFF - NIGHT DAYS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern walks past a movie theater with friends waiting outside, looks at a bridal shop window display, and gives a cigarette to a homeless man.

scenes.heading: EXT. WESTERN SUGAR - NIGHT WEEKS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern works the night shift at the beet plant and watches other migrant workers gather around a burn barrel to stay warm.

scenes.heading: INT. VANGUARD - MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern receives a video message from Swankie showing her kayaking among swallows under a cliff, which makes Fern smile.

scenes.heading: INT. SCOTTSBLUFF - SHOWER - MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern scrubs dirt from her hair and nails in the shower, then looks at herself in the mirror and decides it's time to move on.

scenes.heading: EXT. SCOTTSBLUFF - STRIP MALL - VANGUARD - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Snow falls as Vanguard sits parked alone in an empty strip mall parking lot at night.

scenes.heading: INT. VANGUARD - NIGHT
scenes.summary: A man discovers Fern sleeping in her van and pounds on the door demanding she leave the no-overnight-parking area, causing her to scramble to depart.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROAD ON PLAINS - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern drives through increasingly flat and cold plains during harvest time, passing tractors and field workers.

scenes.heading: INT. FUR TRADE MUSEUM - DAY
scenes.summary: Fern walks through pioneer artifacts at a fur trade museum, watches an igloo-building film, and purchases a beaver pelt.

scenes.heading: EXT. VANGUARD OUTSIDE FUR TRADE MUSEUM - DAY
scenes.summary: Fern hangs the beaver pelt in her van, then discovers Vanguard won't start when she tries to leave the museum.

scenes.heading: INT. GARAGE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Ken the mechanic tells Fern the repair will cost $2,300 while his son Jeremy points out the van is only worth $5,000, leaving Fern mortified.

scenes.heading: EXT. GARAGE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern frantically calls someone for money, gets refused, calls them a bitch, then irons a shirt in her van while Ken prepares to close the garage.

scenes.heading: EXT. WESTERN TERMINAL - MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern shivers in line at a bus terminal, carefully eating a hot dog to avoid staining her freshly ironed yellow shirt.

scenes.heading: INT. BUS ON ROAD - DAY
scenes.summary: Fern rides the bus through suburban neighborhoods while Chinese tourists chat behind her.

scenes.heading: EXT. DOLLY’S HOUSE - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern repeatedly rings Dolly's doorbell until her sister answers, and they exchange a stiff hug with immediate tension about Fern's appearance.

scenes.heading: INT. DOLLY'S HOUSE - KITCHEN - DAY
scenes.summary: Fern gives Dolly a beaver pelt as a gift, agrees to make her four-egg cake, and argues with Dolly about staying overnight versus returning to her van.

scenes.heading: EXT. DOLLY'S HOUSE - GARDEN - EVENING
scenes.summary: At a backyard barbecue, Fern drinks tequila and tells embarrassing stories about how Dolly and George met, making Dolly visibly uncomfortable in front of guests.

scenes.heading: EXT. DOLLY'S HOUSE - BEDROOM - LATER THAT NIGHT
scenes.summary: Dolly gives Fern an envelope of cash for the van repair and mentions their cousin's wedding, but Fern shows no interest in returning to their hometown.

scenes.heading: EXT. DOLLY'S HOUSE - NEXT MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern smokes on the curb, receives a packed lunch from Dolly, hugs goodbye, and walks away after briefly hesitating.

scenes.heading: EXT. GARAGE - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern starts Vanguard's repaired engine successfully, thanks Ken for the extra services, and hugs her steering wheel when he asks where she's headed and she doesn't know.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROADS - TIME PASSING
scenes.summary: Fern travels south through various landscapes, taking her time wandering and camping at truck stops and parking lots.

scenes.heading: INT. NEEDLES, CALIFORNIA - VANGUARD - MORNING
scenes.summary: Police knock on Fern's van door while she's making a sandwich inside.

scenes.heading: EXT. NEEDLES - RESIDENTIAL STREET - VANGUARD - MORNING
scenes.summary: Officer Steve questions Fern about living in her vehicle while a neighborhood woman who likely called police watches from her yard.

scenes.heading: EXT. NEEDLES - RURAL AREA - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern encounters Derek, the young traveler from Quartzsite, by a fire and they trade a sandwich for beer while he gives her a silver lighter cover with a stone.

scenes.heading: EXT. NEEDLES - RURAL AREA - NEXT MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern watches Derek walk away toward the highway, then looks through old family slides while reciting Shakespeare about eternal summer and fading beauty.

scenes.heading: EXT. REDWOODS, CALIFORNIA - MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern stands mesmerized among the ancient redwood giants of northern California.

scenes.heading: EXT. CALFORNIA COAST - LATER
scenes.summary: Vanguard travels coastal roads as the Pacific Ocean appears and the sun bursts through sea mist.

scenes.heading: EXT. DAVE’S HOUSE - MORNING DAYS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern arrives at Dave's beautiful ranch house with gifts, notices his unused van with a flat tire, and is greeted by Dave who introduces her to his daughter-in-law Emily.

scenes.heading: INT. DAVE'S HOUSE - LIVING ROOM/KITCHEN - DAY
scenes.summary: Dave introduces Fern to his gathered family and friends in the living room, where everyone welcomes her until the baby starts crying.

scenes.heading: INT. DAVE’S HOUSE - GUEST BEDROOM - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern sits alone on the large bed in the guest bedroom, recovering from the social interaction in the abnormally spacious room.

scenes.heading: INT. DAVE’S HOUSE - BABY ROOM - LATER
scenes.summary: While folding baby laundry, Fern and Dave discuss his flat tire and his decision to stay with family, as he explains the loneliness of constantly saying goodbye to nomad friends.

scenes.heading: INT. DAVE'S HOUSE - DINING ROOM - EVENING
scenes.summary: The family gathers for Thanksgiving dinner where Dave toasts Fern's arrival and she considers the possibility of a second chance at family life.

scenes.heading: EXT. DAVE'S HOUSE - PORCH - LATER
scenes.summary: Fern and Emily smoke on the porch and discuss quitting smoking, Dave's feelings for Fern, and Fern's memories of Empire's green lawns in the desert.

scenes.heading: INT. DAVE'S HOUSE - BATHROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern takes a blissful bath, experiencing luxury she hasn't had in years.

scenes.heading: INT. DAVE’S HOUSE - STAIRS - LATER
scenes.summary: Fern watches Dave and James play piano together in beautiful synchronicity, initially moved but then feeling restless and short of breath.

scenes.heading: INT. DAVE'S HOUSE - GUEST ROOM - THAT NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern lies awake in the guest bed staring at the ceiling that feels too tall, then gets up and walks out of the room.

scenes.heading: EXT. DAVE’S HOUSE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Fern runs from the house to Vanguard, climbs inside, lies under the covers, and touches the familiar low ceiling before closing her eyes.
scenes.turningPointNote: Fern chooses her van over the house, rejecting the offer of settled family life

scenes.heading: EXT. DAVE’S HOUSE - NEXT MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern stands outside Vanguard smoking as storm clouds approach, looking up at Dave's beautiful and tranquil house.

scenes.heading: INT. DAVE'S HOUSE - LIVING/DINING ROOM - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern quietly walks through the sleeping house, looks at family photos including young Dave with infant James, sits at the empty dining table, then straightens her chair and leaves.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROAD IN TOWN - SAME MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern drives through the quiet town in heavy wind and rain as large drops hit her windshield.

scenes.heading: EXT. OCEAN - SAME MORNING
scenes.summary: Fern walks around ocean cliffs in heavy wind and rain, removes her hat to let rain wash her face, and watches a bird soar alone on the gale.
scenes.turningPointNote: Fern embraces her solitary freedom, symbolically aligning with the lone bird

scenes.heading: EXT. AMAZON WAREHOUSE - MORNING A WEEK LATER
scenes.summary: Fern lines up with seasonal workers at the Amazon warehouse and exchanges nods with Al, who comments that there seem to be more workers every year.

scenes.heading: INT. AMAZON WAREHOUSE - DAY
scenes.summary: Fern works at a packaging station wearing an Ambassador blazer and observes a delivery robot on the warehouse floor.

scenes.heading: EXT. DESERT ROSE RV PARK - EVENING DAYS LATER
scenes.summary: Fern does laundry and solves a jigsaw puzzle alone at the Desert Rose RV Park.

scenes.heading: EXT. AMAZON WAREHOUSE - EVENING A MONTH LATER
scenes.summary: Fern smokes outside the Amazon warehouse while FaceTiming Linda May, and exchanges holiday goodbyes with Doug.

scenes.heading: EXT. DESERT ROSE RV PARK - VANGUARD - NEW YEAR EVE
scenes.summary: Fern sits on her van's footstep on New Year's Eve, lighting a sparkler and wearing a Happy New Year headband as 2013 arrives.

scenes.heading: INT. VANGUARD - EVENING A WEEK LATER
scenes.summary: Fern drives through desert landscapes as she returns to Quartzsite, Arizona.

scenes.heading: EXT. DESERT - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern hikes in the desert searching for a rock, picks one up, and sees the expanded Rubber Tramp Rendezvous camp in the distance.

scenes.heading: EXT. RTR - CAMPFIRE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Nomads gather around a campfire to remember Swankie by tossing stones into the fire, with Bob Wells and then Fern participating in the memorial ritual.

scenes.heading: EXT. DESERT - NEXT DAWN
scenes.summary: Fern sits with Bob Wells at dawn and explains why she stayed in Empire after her husband Beau died, saying she feared leaving would erase his existence.
scenes.turningPointNote: Fern finally articulates her deepest motivation and emotional journey, revealing the core of her attachment to place and memory

scenes.heading: EXT. ROAD - DESERT IN NORTHERN NEVADA - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern drives Vanguard through the vast landscape toward the snowy high desert near Empire.

scenes.heading: INT. VANGUARD - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern drives toward the blue gates of her storage unit.

scenes.heading: EXT. EMPIRE - STORAGE UNIT - EVENING
scenes.summary: Gay and his grandson Nick load all of Fern's possessions from her storage unit into a pickup truck, and Fern makes her final payment, deciding not to keep anything.
scenes.turningPointNote: Fern completely severs her material ties to her past life by giving up all her stored possessions

scenes.heading: EXT. EMPIRE - FACTORY - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern encounters Albert and Bernie at the Empire factory, where Albert explains he's the last caretaker and tells her about the unemployed llamas left behind after the mine closure.

scenes.heading: INT. EMPIRE MINE - FACTORY - EVENING
scenes.summary: Albert shows Fern the factory control panel and recounts pushing the button to stop production on the mine's last day, wishing Beau had been there for the honor.

scenes.heading: EXT. EMPIRE - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern walks through the abandoned Empire streets past two llamas eating weeds, passing the empty baseball field, school, church, and golf course.

scenes.heading: I/E. EMPIRE - FERN’S HOUSE - EVENING
scenes.summary: Fern visits her old house, walks through the empty rooms and backyard where withered rosebushes remain, then leaves the yard behind and walks toward the endless desert stretching to the horizon.
scenes.turningPointNote: Fern's final goodbye to her past life and home, choosing to walk away from her memories toward an uncertain future in the vast desert

structuralWarnings.text: Act 3 is only 13% of the script — structural placement suspect
2 of 3 key moments were auto-corrected by Phase 1C
